name: Ancient God
author: Chu Chang Ge
summary: [Hot-blooded fantasy + domineering iron-blood + decisive killing + exciting rhythm + devouring breakthrough + talent awakening + physical evolution + swordsmanship] In the world of martial arts practice, the glorious dynasty of creation was betrayed by its prime minister, the imperial power was destroyed, the god emperor was imprisoned, and was a waste The prince was killed. Three thousand years later, the prince Ye Feng was reborn and returned. In this life, he awakened his peerless talent, forged a powerful divine body, killed powerful enemies, fought fiercely in the world, and launched an attack on the new generation of divine dynasty three thousand years later! "When I come back from rebirth, I will kill all the enemies in the world with one sword!"
